name: Bitwise Bitcoin ETF
business: Bitwise Bitcoin ETF is an investment trust that seeks to provide exposure to the value of bitcoin held by the Trust, less expenses. Its sole asset is bitcoin, and its shares are listed on NYSE Arca under the ticker BITB. The Trust issues common shares to investors through an exchange-traded product structure.

exposures.sentence: The Trust's investment objective is to seek to provide exposure to the value of bitcoin held by the Trust, less the expenses of the Trust's operations, generally just the Sponsor's management fee.
